hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qiE '\brm\s+(-[a-zA-Z]*[rRf][a-zA-Z]*\s+|.*--no-preserve-root)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: destructive rm command' >&2; exit 2; fi; if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qiE '\b(drop|truncate)\s+table\b'; then echo 'BLOCKED: destructive SQL (drop/truncate table) — dev DB IS prod' >&2; exit 2; fi; if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qiE '\bsupabase\s+(db\s+reset|db\s+push\s+--force|projects\s+delete|migration\s+repair|stop\s+--no-backup)\b'; then echo 'BLOCKED: destructive supabase command — dev DB IS prod' >&2; exit 2; fi
